title: Epic: Unit Test Foundation
description: Setup test infrastructure, mocks, and test utilities, contexts, apiClient. Target: 40% coverage
close_reason: All subtasks completed - test infrastructure and service layer tests done

title: Setup vitest.config.ts with coverage thresholds
description: Update vitest.config.ts with coverage settings and thresholds
design: File: vitest.config.ts | Add coverage provider v8, reporters, include/exclude patterns, thresholds 80/75/80/80
acceptance_criteria: vitest.config.ts has coverage.provider='v8' | coverage.thresholds.global set to 80/75/80/80 | npm run test -- --coverage exits 0 | Coverage HTML report generated in coverage/

title: Create mock infrastructure for @google/genai
description: Create reusable mock for Google GenAI SDK
design: File: __tests__/__mocks__/@google/genai.ts | Mock GoogleGenAI class with models.generateContent, generateImages, generateVideos | Export mock functions for test control
acceptance_criteria: vi.mock('@google/genai') works in tests | GoogleGenAI.mockImplementation() returns controllable instance | models.generateContent, generateImages, generateVideos are mockable | Mock reset works with vi.clearAllMocks()

title: Create mock infrastructure for axios
description: Create reusable mock for axios HTTP client
design: File: __tests__/__mocks__/axios.ts | Mock axios.create with post, get methods | Include interceptors mock
acceptance_criteria: Mock exports default axios | create() returns mockable instance | Tests can control responses

title: Test utils/imageUtils.ts
description: Create unit tests for imageUtils pure functions
design: File: __tests__/utils/imageUtils.test.ts | Test getErrorMessage with various error types | Test blobToBase64 with mocked FileReader | Skip canvas-heavy functions or mock Image/Canvas
acceptance_criteria: getErrorMessage returns translated key for error.api.* patterns | getErrorMessage extracts reason from error.api.textOnlyResponse:reason | blobToBase64 returns Promise with base64 string | Unknown errors return 'error.unknown'

title: Test services/apiClient.ts

acceptance_criteria: Singleton pattern verified | API key management tested | 100% function coverage

title: Test contexts/ImageGalleryContext.tsx

acceptance_criteria: addImage({base64,mimeType}) increases images.length by 1 | addImage with duplicate base64 does not add | images.length never exceeds 20 | deleteImage removes by base64 | clearImages sets images to []

title: Test contexts/LanguageContext.tsx

acceptance_criteria: t() returns translations | Interpolation works | Language switching works | Missing keys return key

title: Epic: Shared Image Generation Options
description: Centralize aspect ratio and resolution options in types.ts as single source of truth. Enable all image features to share consistent options via shared const arrays + types.

title: Add image options to types.ts
description: Add const arrays and types for aspect ratio and resolution to types.ts as single source of truth
design:
Files: types.ts:23
- Add IMAGE_ASPECT_RATIOS const array: ['1:1', '3:4', '9:16', '16:9']
- Add IMAGE_RESOLUTIONS const array: ['1K', '2K', '4K']  
- Add ImageAspectRatio type (union of const + 'Default')
- Add ImageResolution type
- Add defaults: DEFAULT_IMAGE_ASPECT_RATIO, DEFAULT_IMAGE_RESOLUTION
- Update AspectRatio alias for backward compatibility
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] IMAGE_ASPECT_RATIOS exported as const
- [ ] IMAGE_RESOLUTIONS exported as const
- [ ] ImageAspectRatio type includes 'Default'
- [ ] AspectRatio alias points to ImageAspectRatio
- [ ] npm run build SUCCESS

title: Update AspectRatioSelector component
description: Refactor AspectRatioSelector to use shared IMAGE_ASPECT_RATIOS from types.ts
design:
Files: components/AspectRatioSelector.tsx
- Import IMAGE_ASPECT_RATIOS, ImageAspectRatio from types
- Replace hardcoded ratio array with: ['Default', ...IMAGE_ASPECT_RATIOS]
- Update props interface to use ImageAspectRatio type
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] No hardcoded ratio values in component
- [ ] Uses shared IMAGE_ASPECT_RATIOS constant
- [ ] Props use ImageAspectRatio type
- [ ] npm run build SUCCESS

title: Create ResolutionSelector component
description: Create new ResolutionSelector component using shared IMAGE_RESOLUTIONS from types.ts
design:
Files: components/ResolutionSelector.tsx (CREATE)
- Import IMAGE_RESOLUTIONS, ImageResolution from types
- Props: resolution, setResolution
- UI: Button group matching AspectRatioSelector style
- Label: 'Quality:'
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] ResolutionSelector.tsx created
- [ ] Uses IMAGE_RESOLUTIONS const from types
- [ ] Props typed with ImageResolution
- [ ] Matches AspectRatioSelector visual style
- [ ] npm run build SUCCESS

title: Update Gemini image service for API params
description: Update Gemini image service to use generationConfig.imageConfig API params for aspectRatio and resolution
design:
Files: services/gemini/image.ts
- Import ImageAspectRatio, ImageResolution from types
- Add resolution to EditImageParams interface
- Build imageConfig object for API call
- Use imageConfig in ai.models.generateContent config
- Remove prompt-based aspect ratio/resolution instructions
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] EditImageParams has resolution field
- [ ] imageConfig built when aspectRatio or resolution specified
- [ ] API call uses imageConfig in config object
- [ ] No prompt-based ratio/resolution injection
- [ ] npm run build SUCCESS

title: Final validation and integration test
description: Validate full integration of shared image options across all modified files
design:
Steps:
1. Run npm run build - verify SUCCESS
2. Verify type inference works (changing types.ts values affects all components)
3. Spot check components import from types.ts
4. Final commit if needed
acceptance_criteria:
- [ ] npm run build SUCCESS with no errors
- [ ] IMAGE_ASPECT_RATIOS accessible in components
- [ ] IMAGE_RESOLUTIONS accessible in components  
- [ ] All modified files use shared types
- [ ] Changes committed

title: Epic: Service Layer Tests

title: Write imageEditingService tests
description: Test service routing logic for Gemini vs AIVideoAuto
design: File: __tests__/services/imageEditingService.test.ts | Mock gemini/image and aivideoautoService | Test routing based on model prefix | Test error propagation | Test missing token handling
acceptance_criteria: editImage('gemini-*', ...) calls gemini/image.editImage | editImage('aivideoauto--*', ...) calls aivideoautoService.createImage | editImage with aivideoauto-- and null token throws 'error.api.aivideoautoAuth' | Errors from underlying services propagate unchanged
